llm_extraction_process: Optional DeepSeek-assisted extraction drafts review-only candidate records from local PDF text. Candidate records are not merged into the publication dataset automatically.

input_policy.source_type: Local PDF text extracted with PyMuPDF
input_policy.page_selection: Pages are scored by sensing-performance keywords and the highest scoring pages are sent to DeepSeek.
input_policy.review_policy: All LLM outputs are marked needs_review=true and must be checked against evidence_text before promotion to CSV records.

output_contract.merge_policy: Not read by scripts/build_dataset.py. Human review is required before any candidate is copied into a schema-aligned CSV.
